title: get root health check
description: Verify that a GET request to the root endpoint returns a 200 status with server status and a message indicating the server is running.

title: get available models list
description: Verify that a GET request to /v1/models returns a 200 status with a list of available models in OpenAI-compatible format.

title: post chat completions valid request
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/chat/completions with a valid model and messages returns a 200 status with a valid chat completion response.

title: post chat completions invalid request
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/chat/completions with malformed body or missing required fields returns a 400 validation error, and that resubmitting a corrected request returns a 200 with a valid response.

title: post chat completions streaming response
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/chat/completions with stream=true and valid messages returns a 200 status with streamed OpenAI-compatible chunks that can be assembled into a full assistant response.

title: post chat completions streaming invalid request
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/chat/completions with stream=true but invalid payload returns a 400 validation error, and that resubmitting a corrected request with stream=true returns a 200 streamed response.

title: post legacy completions endpoint
description: Verify that a POST request to /v1/completions returns a 400 status instructing the client to use /v1/chat/completions instead.
